results.name: 2200-EDIT-MAP-INPUTS, 2200-EDIT-MAP-INPUTS-EXIT
results.preamble:
File: COACTVWC.cbl
Program: COACTVWC - Business logic - Accept and process Account View request
Paragraph: 2200-EDIT-MAP-INPUTS, 2200-EDIT-MAP-INPUTS-EXIT (lines 622-648)
References: COPY CVCRD01Y, COPY COCOM01Y, COPY DFHBMSCA, COPY DFHAID, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY COACTVW, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSMSG02Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVACT02Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVCUS01Y
Calls: PERFORM 2210-EDIT-ACCOUNT
results.summary: paragraph 2200-EDIT-MAP-INPUTS, 2200-EDIT-MAP-INPUTS-EXIT in COACTVWC.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCRD01Y, COCOM01Y, DFHBMSCA, DFHAID.... invokes: PERFORM 2210-EDIT-ACCOUNT.
results.content:
2200-EDIT-MAP-INPUTS.                                                    
                                                                                
           SET INPUT-OK                  TO TRUE                                
           SET FLG-ACCTFILTER-ISVALID    TO TRUE                                
                                                                                
      *    REPLACE * WITH LOW-VALUES                                            
           IF  ACCTSIDI OF CACTVWAI = '*'                                       
           OR  ACCTSIDI OF CACTVWAI = SPACES                                    
               MOVE LOW-VALUES           TO  CC-ACCT-ID                         
           ELSE                                                                 
               MOVE ACCTSIDI OF CACTVWAI TO  CC-ACCT-ID                         
           END-IF                                                               
                                                                                
      *    INDIVIDUAL FIELD EDITS                                               
           PERFORM 2210-EDIT-ACCOUNT                                            
              THRU 2210-EDIT-ACCOUNT-EXIT                                       
                                                                                
      *    CROSS FIELD EDITS                                                    
           IF  FLG-ACCTFILTER-BLANK                                             
               SET NO-SEARCH-CRITERIA-RECEIVED TO TRUE                          
           END-IF                                                               
           .                                                                    
                                                                                
       2200-EDIT-MAP-INPUTS-EXIT.                                               
           EXIT                                                                 
           .

results.name: 1000-SEND-MAP, 1000-SEND-MAP-EXIT
results.preamble:
File: COACTVWC.cbl
Program: COACTVWC - Business logic - Accept and process Account View request
Paragraph: 1000-SEND-MAP, 1000-SEND-MAP-EXIT (lines 416-430)
References: COPY CVCRD01Y, COPY COCOM01Y, COPY DFHBMSCA, COPY DFHAID, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY COACTVW, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSMSG02Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVACT02Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVCUS01Y
Calls: PERFORM 1100-SCREEN-INIT, PERFORM 1200-SETUP-SCREEN-VARS, PERFORM 1300-SETUP-SCREEN-ATTRS, PERFORM 1400-SEND-SCREEN
results.summary: paragraph 1000-SEND-MAP, 1000-SEND-MAP-EXIT in COACTVWC.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCRD01Y, COCOM01Y, DFHBMSCA, DFHAID.... invokes: PERFORM 1100-SCREEN-INIT, PERFORM 1200-SETUP-SCREEN-VARS, PERFORM 1300-SETUP-SCREEN-ATTRS, PERFORM 1400-SEND-SCREEN.
results.content:
1000-SEND-MAP.                                                           
           PERFORM 1100-SCREEN-INIT                                             
              THRU 1100-SCREEN-INIT-EXIT                                        
           PERFORM 1200-SETUP-SCREEN-VARS                                       
              THRU 1200-SETUP-SCREEN-VARS-EXIT                                  
           PERFORM 1300-SETUP-SCREEN-ATTRS                                      
              THRU 1300-SETUP-SCREEN-ATTRS-EXIT                                 
           PERFORM 1400-SEND-SCREEN                                             
              THRU 1400-SEND-SCREEN-EXIT                                        
           .                                                                    
                                                                                
       1000-SEND-MAP-EXIT.                                                      
           EXIT                                                                 
           .

results.name: CACTVWA
results.content:
CACTVWA DFHMDI CTRL=(FREEKB),                                          -
               DSATTS=(COLOR,HILIGHT,PS,VALIDN),                       -
               MAPATTS=(COLOR,HILIGHT,PS,VALIDN),                      -
               SIZE=(24,80)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=5,                                               -
               POS=(1,1),                                              -
               INITIAL='Tran:'
TRNNAME DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=4,                                               -
               POS=(1,7)
TITLE01 DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=YELLOW,                                           -
               LENGTH=40,                                              -
               POS=(1,21)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=5,                                               -
               POS=(1,65),                                             -
               INITIAL='Date:'
CURDATE DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(1,71),                                             -
               INITIAL='mm/dd/yy'
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=5,                                               -
               POS=(2,1),                                              -
               INITIAL='Prog:'
PGMNAME DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(2,7)
TITLE02 DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=YELLOW,                                           -
               LENGTH=40,                                              -
               POS=(2,21)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=5,                                               -
               POS=(2,65),                                             -
               INITIAL='Time:'
CURTIME DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(2,71),                                             -
               INITIAL='hh:mm:ss'
        DFHMDF COLOR=NEUTRAL,                                          -
               LENGTH=12,                                              -
               POS=(4,33),                                             -
               INITIAL='View Account'
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -
               LENGTH=16,                                              -
               POS=(5,19),                                             -
               INITIAL='Account Number :'
ACCTSID DFHMDF ATTRB=(FSET,IC,NORM,UNPROT),                            -
               COLOR=GREEN,                                            -
               HILIGHT=UNDERLINE,                                      -
               LENGTH=11,                                              -
               PICIN='99999999999',                                    -
               POS=(5,38),                                             -
               VALIDN=(MUSTFILL)
        DFHMDF LENGTH=0,                                               -
               POS=(5,50)
        DFHMDF COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -
               LENGTH=12,                                              -
               POS=(5,57),                                             -
               INITIAL='Active Y/N: '
ACSTTUS DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP),                                          -
               HILIGHT=UNDERLINE,                                      -
               LENGTH=1,                                               -
               POS=(5,70)
        DFHMDF LENGTH=0,                                               -
               POS=(5,72)
        DFHMDF COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -
               LENGTH=7,                                               -
               POS=(6,8),                                              -
               INITIAL='Opened:'
ADTOPEN DFHMDF HILIGHT=UNDERLINE,                                      -
               LENGTH=10,                                              -
               POS=(6,17)
        DFHMDF LENGTH=0,                                               -
               POS=(6,28)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -
               LENGTH=21,                                              -
               POS=(6,39),                                             -
               INITIAL='Credit Limit        :'
ACRDLIM DFHMDF HILIGHT=UNDERLINE,                                      -
               JUSTIFY=(RIGHT),                                        -
               LENGTH=15,                                              -
               PICOUT='+ZZZ,ZZZ,ZZZ.99',                               -
               POS=(6,61)
        DFHMDF LENGTH=0,                                               -
               POS=(6,77)
        DFHMDF COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -
               LENGTH=7,                                               -
               POS=(7,8),                                              -
               INITIAL='Expiry:'
AEXPDT  DFHMDF HILIGHT=UNDERLINE,                                      -
               LENGTH=10,                                              -
               POS=(7,17)
        DFHMDF LENGTH=0,                                               -

        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -

               LENGTH=21,                                              -
               POS=(7,39),                                             -
               INITIAL='Cash credit Limit   :'

               JUSTIFY=(RIGHT),                                        -

        DFHMDF COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -

        DFHMDF LENGTH=0,                                               -

        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -

        DFHMDF LENGTH=0,                                               -

        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -

        DFHMDF COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -

               POS=(10,8),                                             -

AADDGRP DFHMDF HILIGHT=UNDERLINE,                                      -
               LENGTH=10,                                              -
               POS=(10,23)
        DFHMDF LENGTH=0,

results.name: 2100-RECEIVE-MAP, 2100-RECEIVE-MAP-EXIT
results.preamble:
File: COACTVWC.cbl
Program: COACTVWC - Business logic - Accept and process Account View request
Paragraph: 2100-RECEIVE-MAP, 2100-RECEIVE-MAP-EXIT (lines 610-621)
References: COPY CVCRD01Y, COPY COCOM01Y, COPY DFHBMSCA, COPY DFHAID, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY COACTVW, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSMSG02Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVACT02Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVCUS01Y
results.summary: paragraph 2100-RECEIVE-MAP, 2100-RECEIVE-MAP-EXIT in COACTVWC.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCRD01Y, COCOM01Y, DFHBMSCA, DFHAID....
results.content:
2100-RECEIVE-MAP.                                                        
           EXEC CICS RECEIVE MAP(LIT-THISMAP)                                   
                     MAPSET(LIT-THISMAPSET)                                     
                     INTO(CACTVWAI)                                             
                     RESP(WS-RESP-CD)                                           
                     RESP2(WS-REAS-CD)                                          
           END-EXEC                                                             
           .                                                                    
                                                                                
       2100-RECEIVE-MAP-EXIT.                                                   
           EXIT                                                                 
           .

results.name: 1300-SETUP-SCREEN-ATTRS, 1300-SETUP-SCREEN-ATTRS-EXIT
results.preamble:
File: COACTVWC.cbl
Program: COACTVWC - Business logic - Accept and process Account View request
Paragraph: 1300-SETUP-SCREEN-ATTRS, 1300-SETUP-SCREEN-ATTRS-EXIT (lines 541-576)
References: COPY CVCRD01Y, COPY COCOM01Y, COPY DFHBMSCA, COPY DFHAID, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY COACTVW, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSMSG02Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVACT02Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVCUS01Y
results.summary: paragraph 1300-SETUP-SCREEN-ATTRS, 1300-SETUP-SCREEN-ATTRS-EXIT in COACTVWC.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCRD01Y, COCOM01Y, DFHBMSCA, DFHAID....
results.content:
1300-SETUP-SCREEN-ATTRS.                                                 
      *    PROTECT OR UNPROTECT BASED ON CONTEXT                                
           MOVE DFHBMFSE               TO ACCTSIDA OF CACTVWAI                  
                                                                                
      *    POSITION CURSOR                                                      
           EVALUATE TRUE                                                        
              WHEN FLG-ACCTFILTER-NOT-OK                                        
              WHEN FLG-ACCTFILTER-BLANK                                         
                   MOVE -1             TO ACCTSIDL OF CACTVWAI                  
              WHEN OTHER                                                        
                   MOVE -1             TO ACCTSIDL OF CACTVWAI                  
           END-EVALUATE                                                         
                                                                                
      *    SETUP COLOR                                                          
           MOVE DFHDFCOL               TO ACCTSIDC OF CACTVWAO                  
                                                                                
           IF FLG-ACCTFILTER-NOT-OK                                             
              MOVE DFHRED              TO ACCTSIDC OF CACTVWAO                  
           END-IF                                                               
                                                                                
           IF  FLG-ACCTFILTER-BLANK                                             
           AND CDEMO-PGM-REENTER                                                
               MOVE '*'                TO ACCTSIDO OF CACTVWAO                  
               MOVE DFHRED             TO ACCTSIDC OF CACTVWAO                  
           END-IF                                                               
                                                                                
           IF  WS-NO-INFO-MESSAGE                                               
               MOVE DFHBMDAR           TO INFOMSGC OF CACTVWAO                  
           ELSE                                                                 
               MOVE DFHNEUTR           TO INFOMSGC OF CACTVWAO                  
           END-IF                                                               
           .                                                                    
                                                                                
       1300-SETUP-SCREEN-ATTRS-EXIT.                                            
           EXIT                                                                 
           .

results.name: 1200-SETUP-SCREEN-VARS, 1200-SETUP-SCREEN-VARS-EXIT
results.preamble:
File: COACTVWC.cbl
Program: COACTVWC - Business logic - Accept and process Account View request
Paragraph: 1200-SETUP-SCREEN-VARS, 1200-SETUP-SCREEN-VARS-EXIT (lines 460-540)
References: COPY CVCRD01Y, COPY COCOM01Y, COPY DFHBMSCA, COPY DFHAID, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY COACTVW, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSMSG02Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVACT02Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVCUS01Y
results.summary: paragraph 1200-SETUP-SCREEN-VARS, 1200-SETUP-SCREEN-VARS-EXIT in COACTVWC.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCRD01Y, COCOM01Y, DFHBMSCA, DFHAID....
results.content:
1200-SETUP-SCREEN-VARS.                                                  
      *    INITIALIZE SEARCH CRITERIA                                           
           IF EIBCALEN = 0                                                      
              SET  WS-PROMPT-FOR-INPUT TO TRUE                                  
           ELSE
              IF FLG-ACCTFILTER-BLANK  
                 MOVE LOW-VALUES   TO ACCTSIDO OF CACTVWAO                      
              ELSE                                                              
                 MOVE CC-ACCT-ID   TO ACCTSIDO OF CACTVWAO                      
              END-IF                                                            
                                                                                
              IF FOUND-ACCT-IN-MASTER                                           
              OR FOUND-CUST-IN-MASTER                                           
                 MOVE ACCT-ACTIVE-STATUS  TO ACSTTUSO OF CACTVWAO               
                                                                                
                 MOVE ACCT-CURR-BAL       TO ACURBALO OF CACTVWAO               
                                                                                
                 MOVE ACCT-CREDIT-LIMIT   TO ACRDLIMO OF CACTVWAO               
                                                                                
                 MOVE ACCT-CASH-CREDIT-LIMIT
                                          TO ACSHLIMO OF CACTVWAO               
                                                                                
                 MOVE ACCT-CURR-CYC-CREDIT          
                                          TO ACRCYCRO OF CACTVWAO               
                                                                                
                 MOVE ACCT-CURR-CYC-DEBIT TO ACRCYDBO OF CACTVWAO               
                                                                                
                 MOVE ACCT-OPEN-DATE      TO ADTOPENO OF CACTVWAO               
                 MOVE ACCT-EXPIRAION-DATE TO AEXPDTO  OF CACTVWAO               
                 MOVE ACCT-REISSUE-DATE   TO AREISDTO OF CACTVWAO               
                 MOVE ACCT-GROUP-ID       TO AADDGRPO OF CACTVWAO               
              END-IF                                                            
                                                                                
              IF FOUND-CUST-IN-MASTER                                           
                MOVE CUST-ID              TO ACSTNUMO OF CACTVWAO               
      *         MOVE CUST-SSN             TO ACSTSSNO OF CACTVWAO       
                STRING 
                    CUST-SSN(1:3)
                    '-'                 
                    CUST-SSN(4:2)
                    '-'
                    CUST-SSN(6:4)
                    DELIMITED BY SIZE
                    INTO ACSTSSNO OF CACTVWAO
                END-STRING                                                      
                MOVE CUST-FICO-CREDIT-SCORE                                     
                                          TO ACSTFCOO OF CACTVWAO               
                MOVE CUST-DOB-YYYY-MM-DD  TO ACSTDOBO OF CACTVWAO               
                MOVE CUST-FIRST-NAME      TO ACSFNAMO OF CACTVWAO               
                MOVE CUST-MIDDLE-NAME     TO ACSMNAMO OF CACTVWAO               
                MOVE CUST-LAST-NAME       TO ACSLNAMO OF CACTVWAO               
                MOVE CUST-ADDR-LINE-1     TO ACSADL1O OF CACTVWAO               
                MOVE CUST-ADDR-LINE-2     TO ACSADL2O OF CACTVWAO               
                MOVE CUST-ADDR-LINE-3     TO ACSCITYO OF CACTVWAO               
                MOVE CUST-ADDR-STATE-CD   TO ACSSTTEO OF CACTVWAO               
                MOVE CUST-ADDR-ZIP        TO ACSZIPCO OF CACTVWAO               
                MOVE CUST-ADDR-COUNTRY-CD TO ACSCTRYO OF CACTVWAO               
                MOVE CUST-PHONE-NUM-1     TO ACSPHN1O OF CACTVWAO               
                MOVE CUST-PHONE-NUM-2     TO ACSPHN2O OF CACTVWAO               
                MOVE CUST-GOVT-ISSUED-ID  TO ACSGOVTO OF CACTVWAO               
                MOVE CUST-EFT-ACCOUNT-ID  TO ACSEFTCO OF CACTVWAO               
                MOVE CUST-PRI-CARD-HOLDER-IND                                   
                                          TO ACSPFLGO OF CACTVWAO               
              END-IF                                                            
                                                                                
            END-IF                                                              
                                                                                
      *    SETUP MESSAGE                                                        
           IF WS-NO-INFO-MESSAGE                                                
             SET WS-PROMPT-FOR-INPUT TO TRUE                                    
           END-IF                                                               
                                                                                
           MOVE WS-RETURN-MSG          TO ERRMSGO OF CACTVWAO                   
                                                                                
           MOVE WS-INFO-MSG            TO INFOMSGO OF CACTVWAO                  
           .                                                                    
                                                                                
       1200-SETUP-SCREEN-VARS-EXIT.                                             
           EXIT                                                                 
           .

results.name: 1400-SEND-SCREEN, 1400-SEND-SCREEN-EXIT
results.preamble:
File: COACTVWC.cbl
Program: COACTVWC - Business logic - Accept and process Account View request
Paragraph: 1400-SEND-SCREEN, 1400-SEND-SCREEN-EXIT (lines 577-595)
References: COPY CVCRD01Y, COPY COCOM01Y, COPY DFHBMSCA, COPY DFHAID, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY COACTVW, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSMSG02Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVACT02Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVCUS01Y
results.summary: paragraph 1400-SEND-SCREEN, 1400-SEND-SCREEN-EXIT in COACTVWC.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCRD01Y, COCOM01Y, DFHBMSCA, DFHAID....
results.content:
1400-SEND-SCREEN.                                                        
                                                                                
           MOVE LIT-THISMAPSET         TO CCARD-NEXT-MAPSET                     
           MOVE LIT-THISMAP            TO CCARD-NEXT-MAP                        
           SET  CDEMO-PGM-REENTER TO TRUE                                       
                                                                                
           EXEC CICS SEND MAP(CCARD-NEXT-MAP)                                   
                          MAPSET(CCARD-NEXT-MAPSET)                             
                          FROM(CACTVWAO)                                        
                          CURSOR                                                
                          ERASE                                                 
                          FREEKB                                                
                          RESP(WS-RESP-CD)                                      
           END-EXEC                                                             
           .                                                                    
       1400-SEND-SCREEN-EXIT.                                                   
           EXIT                                                                 
           .

Data: DATA DIVISION (lines 32-34)
results.summary: data_division DATA DIVISION in COACTVWC.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCRD01Y, COCOM01Y, DFHBMSCA, DFHAID....
